target: 8. Lunch Time ①

It's only been two days since Shio passed away.
You should take a break for a while, right?!

No, no… that's not possible!
As long as we're alive, we have to eat, don't we?

The restaurant…
It's always there, no matter what…!!!

What's important is the routine.
It's important for the customers too, and for us family…

Ugh…!!!
It's delicious today too…!!!

(Daily life…
What Alan is trying to protect is the usual "routine")

(But… tomorrow at 9 AM…
In just a few hours, Hitogashima's daily life will be swallowed by a black shadow…)

(I won't let that happen…!!!
Not again…!!)

Gone…?
All of Mio's family disappeared?!
Mio-san greeted me yesterday too…

Well, I can't say much yet,
but the police from the mainland are coming soon!

(If we eliminate the shadows,
more people will disappear)
(It also means the shadows are multiplying)

Right!
There's something you need to give to Shinpei!
Could this be… Mio's phone?!

Shio…
Come to my place the day before she died.
She left this, saying "Please keep it for me."
"If something happens to me, I want you to give it to Shinpei."

(That's right… What was she thinking when she left this…
Could there be important information inside?!)
Mio, do you know the password?
Maybe it's her birthday?
No… it's not working.

(As expected…
I tried everything in the previous loop but couldn't crack it)
Maybe she changed the password?
Hmm…
(It's intentionally changed…)

(The four-digit combinations are 10,000 possibilities…
It's impossible to crack today or tomorrow…)

(Wait…!
If it's Shio, she might know the password…)

(Good…
I'll show this to her later…)
19. Lunch Time ②
July 23

Hey!
Welcome back, Shin!

How was it?
Shiori-chan…
U… um…

(How should I say it…
I can't just say they've been replaced by shadows…)
Ah~ ~ ~, it's so hot, so hot!!!
Welcome!

(Totsumura-san…
You came here after checking on the Kofune family, right?)
Ah.

Hey Shinpei!
You said there was a fight yesterday, but it was a lie, right?!
Where did you get into a fight--

The usual B-lunch,

…You understood it well, huh?

--Wait, gone…?
All of Mio's family disappeared?!!!
Well, that's how it is.
You're serious, Shin!
Ah…
You should have entered with Shizuka too, right?
Ah… yes.
I'll talk to you later.

That's not possible…
Mio-san greeted me yesterday too…

That's right~ ~ ~.
Well, I can't say much yet,
but the police from the mainland are coming soon!
(It's different from Totsumura's usual response…)

(Good… I guess I prevented the real Totsumura from being killed by the shadow.
This one is the real one!)

(Though he seems unreliable, he's still a cop.
If I don't know Mio Shiori's true identity,
I might have to rely on the police's help…)
Hey…
Right!

(Oops, I got caught.
What should I do?)
"I need to talk to you about something."
"I need some time."
"Totsumura, you go first."
I need to talk to you about something…
What's wrong? You're being so formal.
I need some time…

It's fine, but if it's about some trouble with dangerous people in Tokyo,
save it for another time.

That's not possible!
…I just need to talk about something.
Huh, what's it about?
Totsumura, you go first.

Ah, it's okay?
Then…

There's something you need to give to Shinpei!
Here!
<color=#GF_KEY_USI_SMARTPHONE>smartphone</color>…?

Hey!!!
Could this be… Mio's…?!

Shio…
Come to my place the day before she died…
She left this, saying "Please keep it for me."

"If something happens to me,
I want you to give it to Shinpei."
Shio… gave this to me…?!

It's like she knew…
Shio…
What was going to happen to herself…

(Shio, what did you know,
and what were you thinking…)

(With so much going on,
my thoughts are getting all tangled up…)
July 23

(July 23--
The day after the funeral, Alan already opened the shop)
(I decided to help out at the shop with Mio)

(It's the best way to distract myself from the loss.
I'm sure Alan and Mio felt the same way.)
(Luckily, the lunch rush was booming today)

Alan, order.
One A-lunch, two B-lunches.
Yes sir!

Shinpei-kun, Shinpei-kun!
Wait a second!

Yes, is there anything else you want to order?
If you're going to drink, be careful.

No, no! I mean--
Did you find the person you were looking for?!

Huh?
The person you're looking for…?
You said you were looking for her this morning!

Here!!!
She's the one with glasses and big breasts!
Huh?!

(I don't remember saying that, and
I haven't even met Totsumura!)

Was that really me?
You're drinking too much, Totsumura!
What~ ~ ~?!
Welcome!

Ah~ ~ ~, it's so hot, so hot!!!
I'll have my usual.
Huh?
Well then… Huhuhi.
Uh… what's my usual?

Huh? Oh my god!!!
Who are you, Shinpei-kun?!
…I don't know how to say this about Shio…
…Even if you say that while looking at an adult site…
S-sorry… I just did it out of habit.
Is that your police officer's habit?

(This person is Totsumura. He's a relative of the Kofune family

(…but seeing this, I can't help but feel uneasy)
Ah, Totsumura, welcome~ ~ ~.

Mio-chan!
You look cute today~ ~ ~.

Your usual B-lunch,

Alright, thanks!
Shinpei-kun, that was my "usual".
Remember that well!
Huh…
Totsumura, why didn't you come for breakfast this morning?

That's right… Listen to me!
It was really tough!

Actually… the Kofune family,
they all disappeared.
Eh…?
Disappeared?!

<color=#GF_TIPS_087>Divine Concealment</color> kind of thing…
Hey!! It's a big deal, isn't it?!

Wait a second!
Kobayakawa… that… Koba Mart…?!

Shinpei, lend me your face for a moment.
You don't need to shout so much.
Ah, yes.

This morning…
They said Koba Mart isn't open even at 8 AM…

Next door's Hole…

Well, that store… it seems like they had a lot of debt,

But Totsumura-san, you're the one shouting!
Oh… hey, Mio?!
Mio, where do you think you're going?!
Ah…

Shinpei, forget about the store,
